pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates table sales_fact (stored uppercase in Oracle)
setup_task.sh creates table sales_staging_dec11 (stored uppercase in Oracle)
setup_task.sh defines partition p_2011_12 (stored uppercase in Oracle)
setup_task.sh creates index idx_sales_customer (stored uppercase in Oracle)
setup_task.sh creates index idx_sales_invoice (stored uppercase in Oracle)

privileged_info_summary: The task requires performing a partition exchange load into the P_2011_12 partition of the SALES_FACT table from the SALES_STAGING_DEC11 table. The environment initializes a global index (IDX_SALES_CUSTOMER) and a local index (IDX_SALES_INVOICE) on SALES_FACT, which must remain valid after the exchange. The dataset consists of synthetic retail transactions for 2011.
